evidence.description: Joe Biden, while known for being a close-talker, is being skewered on social media after photos and video reveal him getting a little too close with the new Defense Secretary's wife.

image_captions: Vice President Joe Biden stands with Stephanie Carter, wife of incoming Defense Secretary Ash Carter, right, during Carter's swearing in ceremony.
Vice President Joe Biden stands with Stephanie Carter, wife of incoming Defense Secretary Ash Carter.
Stephanie Carter watches at center as her husband Ash Carter, right, shakes hands with Vice President Joe Biden after being sworn in as the new Defense Secretary.
